title: Dekton 10" Sure Grip Adjustable Spanner-1 1/4" Jaw Capacity| Straight Jaw Wrench| Printed Width Scale| Sure Grip-Non Slip Grip Handle for Comfort| Hardened and Tempered Steel| Bonus 16mm Ring Spanner
features: Versatile 8-Inch Adjustable Spanner: The Dekton 10" Sure Grip Adjustable Spanner features a 1 1/4" jaw capacity, making it perfect for a wide range of tasks. Whether you're tightening or loosening various sizes of nuts and bolts, this spanner adapts effortlessly to your needs.

Precision with Printed Width Scale: Equipped with a convenient printed width scale on the jaw, this spanner allows for precise adjustments and ensures accurate measurements every time. This feature helps in achieving the right fit for your projects, enhancing efficiency and precision.

Straight Jaw Design: The straight jaw configuration provides optimal contact with the surface, ensuring a secure grip and reducing the likelihood of slipping. This design is ideal for handling different types of fasteners, making it a reliable tool for various applications.

Durable Hardened and Tempered Steel Construction: Crafted from hardened and tempered steel, this spanner offers exceptional strength and durability. It’s engineered to withstand heavy-duty use and resist wear, providing a long-lasting, reliable tool for both professional and DIY projects.

Bonus 16mm Ring Spanner Included: To add extra value, the Dekton 10" Sure Grip Adjustable Spanner comes with a bonus 14mm ring spanner. This additional tool complements the adjustable spanner, offering versatility and expanding your toolkit for various repair and maintenance tasks.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON 10” Sure Grip Adjustable Spanner 30cm jaw capacity. Straight jaw wrench. Printed width scale. Sure Grip - non slip grip handle for comfort. Hardened & tempered steel. Bonus 16mm ring spanner.
